raw: {"questions":[{"label":"State of play","name":"Before we get specific, what’s most on your mind at work right now?","description":"Safe opener that lets Lin set context without steering toward a concern.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Late nights now","name":"What’s driving the late nights now that those launches are done?","description":"Checks whether the recent push is still tied to a short-term finish line or has become the working norm.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Sustainable pace","name":"Does this pace feel sustainable for the next month?","description":"Surfaces whether the current tempo is still acceptable or quietly too high.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"What’s on you","name":"What work is still sitting squarely on your desk that doesn’t need to be?","description":"Gets at delegation and ownership boundaries without assuming the answer.","purpose":"competency","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision load","name":"Where are you still the bottleneck?","description":"Finds spots where Lin may be carrying decisions that could move faster with different ownership.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Keep versus hand off","name":"What are you keeping because it truly needs you?","description":"Separates essential personal ownership from habits that may be hard to let go of.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Team leverage","name":"Where could someone else take more of the load without losing quality?","description":"Looks for delegation opportunities that preserve standards while reducing reliance on Lin.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support needed","name":"What would be most useful from me over the next two weeks?","description":"Opens the door for air cover, unblocking, or decision support in a concrete way.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next two weeks","name":"What would make the next two weeks lighter for you?","description":"Closes by steering toward practical changes that reduce load without introducing new topics.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
